=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/syncToSucceed_preview.ts(3,24): suggestion TS377103: `Effect.succeed` expresses this constant value more directly than `Effect.sync`. effect(syncToSucceed)


==== /.src/syncToSucceed_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.sync(() => "constant")
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! suggestion TS377103: `Effect.succeed` expresses this constant value more directly than `Effect.sync`. effect(syncToSucceed)
